entity.summary: Decentralized exchange application providing wallet-connected token swaps, configurable slippage, liquidity pools, and V3 concentrated-liquidity positions.
entity.notes: Current first-party application exposes live swap and pool surfaces, including token selection, configurable slippage, wallet connection, pool creation, and V3 liquidity-position management. Confidence is medium because public protocol documentation is thin; current exchange identity is additionally corroborated by the completed exchange candidate corpus.

evidence.title: EverySwap swap application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application exposes a wallet-connected swap interface with buy and sell token selection and automatic or custom slippage controls.

evidence.title: EverySwap pool positions
evidence.notes: Current first-party pool surface exposes liquidity-pool navigation, new-position creation, wallet connection, and V3 liquidity-position management.

evidence.title: EverySwap exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: June 2026 exchange candidate corpus source identifies EverySwap under the everyswap.io domain, corroborating the live first-party swap and liquidity-pool application identity.
